name: Plum Tuna
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the plum jam in a heavy-bottomed pan.
2. Mix together the cornstarch and 1/4 cup of water to form a slurry.
3. Add the ground ginger, minced garlic, remaining water, salt, soy sauce, and vinegar to the pan with the plum jam.
4. Stir constantly until the mixture thickens.
5. Add the diced tuna and heat through.
6. Serve over mounds of hot cooked rice.
7. Garnish with chopped nuts, parsley, and coconut flakes if desired.
